ideas.title: Cold calling
ideas.description: Calling people who don't know you yet, working through a list or the Do Not Call-compliant process.

ideas.title: Cold emailing
ideas.description: Reaching out by email to people who haven't engaged with you before.

ideas.title: Cold DMs
ideas.description: Direct messages on LinkedIn, Instagram, or Facebook to people outside your network.

ideas.title: In-person approach
ideas.description: Approaching people directly in public locations (e.g. Melbourne CBD spots already scoped).

ideas.title: Voicemail / voice notes
ideas.description: Leaving a voice note or voicemail as a softer cold touch than a live call.

ideas.title: Thoughtful comments on strangers' posts
ideas.description: Genuinely useful comments in relevant groups as a way into a conversation.

ideas.title: Message existing contacts
ideas.description: Tell people you already know what you're building and ask if they know someone burnt out.

ideas.title: Reconnect with old colleagues/clients
ideas.description: Reach back out to people from past roles or past coaching relationships.

ideas.title: Ask for introductions
ideas.description: Ask happy contacts to introduce you to someone who might need this.

ideas.title: Follow up with gone-quiet leads
ideas.description: Check back in on past inquiries or no-shows who never converted.

ideas.title: Check in on past one-off clients
ideas.description: Reach out to people you've coached once before to see how they're doing.

ideas.title: LinkedIn posts
ideas.description: Regular posts aimed at burnt-out professionals, where they already spend time.

ideas.title: Twitter / X posts
ideas.description: Shorter-form written posts on X.

ideas.title: Blog or newsletter
ideas.description: Longer-form writing published on your own platform.

ideas.title: Comments on others' posts
ideas.description: Genuinely useful comments that build visibility without pitching.

ideas.title: Guest posts
ideas.description: Writing for someone else's blog or newsletter to borrow their audience.

ideas.title: Quote-card graphics
ideas.description: Short insight turned into a simple shareable graphic.

ideas.title: Anonymised case studies
ideas.description: Client stories (anonymised) written up as content.

ideas.title: Short-form video
ideas.description: Talking to camera, no edits required — low production.

ideas.title: Voice notes turned into audio clips
ideas.description: Repurposing a voice note into a short shareable audio piece.

ideas.title: Podcast (yours)
ideas.description: Hosting your own recurring podcast.

ideas.title: Podcast guesting
ideas.description: Appearing as a guest on other people's podcasts in the niche.

ideas.title: Webinars / live Q&As
ideas.description: Live online sessions answering questions in real time.

ideas.title: Client testimonials (recorded)
ideas.description: Asking clients for a short recorded testimonial.

ideas.title: Facebook/Instagram lead ads
ideas.description: Paid lead-generation ads on Meta platforms (already explored).

ideas.title: LinkedIn ads
ideas.description: Paid ads targeting professionals on LinkedIn.

ideas.title: Google ads
ideas.description: Ads targeting people actively searching for burnout coaching.

ideas.title: Boost a high-performing post
ideas.description: Putting paid spend behind organic content that's already working.

ideas.title: Reach out to GPs / psychologists
ideas.description: Build relationships with referral sources who see burnt-out clients first.

ideas.title: Reach out to HR managers / recruiters
ideas.description: People who already meet your audience professionally.

ideas.title: Free talk/workshop for a company
ideas.description: Offer a free session to a business or association as a foot in the door.

ideas.title: Cross-promotion with other coaches
ideas.description: Partner with coaches serving a different niche to swap audiences.

ideas.title: Affiliate-style referral arrangement
ideas.description: Pay a referral fee to people who send clients your way.

ideas.title: Networking events / meetups
ideas.description: Attending industry meetups or business breakfasts.

ideas.title: Relevant Facebook/LinkedIn groups
ideas.description: Joining and genuinely participating in groups your audience is in.

ideas.title: Host a small free event/workshop
ideas.description: Run your own low-cost gathering.

ideas.title: Speak somewhere (Rotary, business group)
ideas.description: Volunteer to speak at an existing community organisation.

ideas.title: Check in with past clients
ideas.description: A simple periodic touch-base with people you've already coached.

ideas.title: Ask past clients for referrals
ideas.description: A direct, simple ask once trust is established.

ideas.title: Ask for testimonials/reviews
ideas.description: Collect proof points that can become content later.

ideas.title: Re-engage old non-converted leads
ideas.description: Reach out again to people who didn't convert the first time.

ideas.title: Simple website with clear positioning
ideas.description: A site that states clearly who you help and how.

ideas.title: Google Business profile
ideas.description: If relevant to how people might search for you locally.

ideas.title: Coach directory listings
ideas.description: Getting listed in relevant directories where people search for coaches.

ideas.title: Optimise LinkedIn profile as a landing page
ideas.description: Treat your profile itself as a conversion surface.

ideas.title: Weekly YouTube livestream / show
ideas.description: A recurring live format — interviews or live mini-coaching.

ideas.title: Recurring YouTube series
ideas.description: A consistent format and title, e.g. a named recurring segment.

ideas.title: Guesting on other YouTube channels
ideas.description: Appearing on established channels in the niche.

ideas.title: Docu-style client transformation series
ideas.description: Following a consenting client's journey over weeks or months.

ideas.title: Reaction-style videos
ideas.description: Responding to LinkedIn discourse or news about burnout/work culture.

ideas.title: Behind-the-scenes / day-in-the-life series
ideas.description: Building the coaching business itself as relatable content.

ideas.title: Pitch as a guest expert (radio/TV)
ideas.description: Local media segments about burnout or work culture.

ideas.title: Opinion pieces for publications
ideas.description: Writing for online or industry press.

ideas.title: Expert source for journalists
ideas.description: Services like Help A Reporter Out / Qwoted.

ideas.title: Recurring free webinar series
ideas.description: Monthly, same time, same format — building a returning audience.

ideas.title: In-person workshop/talk at a venue
ideas.description: A bigger one-off or recurring talk hosted somewhere real.

ideas.title: Co-hosted panel discussion
ideas.description: Panel with psychologists or HR leads on burnout.

ideas.title: Book or self-published guide
ideas.description: A long-term credibility asset and lead magnet.

ideas.title: Structured email course
ideas.description: An automated multi-day email sequence, e.g. 'spot burnout before it spots you'.

ideas.title: Free Facebook/Discord community
ideas.description: A space you seed and moderate for burnt-out professionals.

ideas.title: Recurring challenge format
ideas.description: e.g. a free 5-day reset challenge that runs periodically.

ideas.title: Pitch local business owners directly
ideas.description: Gyms, allied health clinics, co-working spaces.

ideas.title: Speak at a school/uni careers night
ideas.description: Reach graduating students about to enter high-stress careers.

ideas.title: Stall at a wellness/careers/business expo
ideas.description: A physical presence at a relevant expo.

ideas.title: Flyers/posters in CBD buildings, gyms, stations
ideas.description: Guerrilla-style physical print outreach.

ideas.title: QR-code business card
ideas.description: A simple physical-to-digital handoff for every interaction.

ideas.title: Free interactive burnout quiz
ideas.description: A self-assessment tool that captures emails as a lead magnet.

ideas.title: Looser meme/relatable content account
ideas.description: Funnier, looser content feeding into the serious offer.

ideas.title: Referral/affiliate program with cash incentive
ideas.description: Pay past clients for successful referrals.

ideas.title: AI chatbot mini-diagnostic on website
ideas.description: A quick interactive tool that books a call.

ideas.title: Get featured in 'best coaches' listicles
ideas.description: Directories or roundup articles.

ideas.title: Reverse-engineer what already performs
ideas.description: Study top content in the niche and make your own version.

ideas.title: Get interviewed by other coaches/newsletters
ideas.description: Even ones that are technically competitors.

ideas.title: Co-run a webinar with a complementary business
ideas.description: A financial advisor or therapist brings half the audience.

ideas.title: Giveaway inside someone else's community
ideas.description: A free session draw inside a larger existing audience.

ideas.title: Public speaking competitions / TEDx-style stages
ideas.description: Bigger stage opportunities for authority-building.

ideas.title: Enter or sponsor industry awards
ideas.description: Status-building through recognised awards.

ideas.title: Regular column for a business publication
ideas.description: An ongoing writing slot in an established outlet.

ideas.title: Personal brand portfolio website
ideas.description: A long-term proof-piece site.

ideas.title: Results/case-study page
ideas.description: A page built purely to be linked to from everywhere else.

ideas.title: Letterbox drops in high-income suburbs
ideas.description: Direct print outreach to targeted households.

ideas.title: Print ads in niche publications
ideas.description: Industry association newsletters or business magazines.

ideas.title: Billboard or transit ad
ideas.description: If budget ever allowed.

ideas.title: Partner with corporate wellness/EAP providers
ideas.description: Become the external coach they refer out to.

ideas.title: Pitch HR departments for a paid workshop
ideas.description: A workshop that becomes a pipeline of 1:1 referrals inside the company.

ideas.title: Physical 'burnout pop-up'
ideas.description: A one-day quiet space/experience in public as soft lead-gen.

ideas.title: Collaborate with an artist/designer
ideas.description: An illustrated zine on burnout that travels on its own.

ideas.title: Small paid research survey + published results
ideas.description: A PR/content piece built from original research on burnout.

ideas.title: Recurring 'burnout social'
ideas.description: Drinks/coffee meetup where people connect, no pitch involved.

ideas.title: Structured practice night
ideas.description: A condensed live version of coaching tools, run in pairs/small groups.

ideas.title: Themed dinner/retreat evening
ideas.description: Immersive evening themed around purpose or identity.

ideas.title: Walk-and-talk event
ideas.description: Outdoor, low-pressure, easier for first-timers.

ideas.title: Career reinvention mixer
ideas.description: Self-selecting event for people contemplating a change.

ideas.title: Recurring supper/breakfast club
ideas.description: Same time each month, building a returning crowd.

ideas.title: Unconventional 'permission to let go' night
ideas.description: Feeling-first format that opens the door to deeper conversation.

ideas.title: Alumni night for past clients
ideas.description: Past clients reconnect, swap progress, bring a friend.
